directors.name: Michael S. Burke
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Burke retired in August 2020 as Chairman and CEO of AECOM, a global infrastructure firm, where he had worked since 2005 in various leadership roles including CFO and Chief Corporate Officer. Prior to AECOM, he held leadership positions at KPMG LLP.

directors.name: Terrell K. Crews
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Crews retired from Monsanto Company in 2009, where he served as Executive Vice President, CFO and Vegetable Business CEO. He brings extensive expertise in finance, agri-business, and international operations.

directors.name: Theodore Colbert
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Colbert is Executive Vice President of The Boeing Company and President and CEO of Boeing Global Services since October 2019, having served in various IT leadership roles at Boeing since 2009. Prior to Boeing, he served as Senior Vice President of Enterprise Architecture at Citigroup from 2007 to 2009.

directors.name: Pierre Dufour
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Dufour retired in July 2017 as Senior Executive Vice President of Air Liquide Group, where he had worked since 1997, overseeing operations in the Americas, Africa-Middle East, and Asia-Pacific zones. He brings substantial leadership, engineering, operations management, and international business experience.

directors.name: Donald E. Felsinger
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Felsinger retired as Executive Chairman of Sempra Energy in December 2012 and brings extensive experience as a board member, chair, and CEO with Fortune 500 companies. His expertise spans mergers and acquisitions, environmental matters, corporate governance, and strategic planning.

directors.name: Suzan F. Harrison
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Harrison retired in 2019 as President of Global Oral Care at Colgate-Palmolive Company, where she held various leadership roles beginning in 1983, including President of Hill's Pet Nutrition Inc. North America. She brings extensive leadership, management, operations, marketing, and international experience.

directors.name: Patrick J. Moore
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Moore is President and CEO of PJM Advisors, LLC since 2011, and retired as CEO of Smurfit-Stone Container Corporation in 2011. Prior to 1987, he served 12 years at Continental Bank in corporate lending, international banking, and administrative positions.

directors.name: Juan R. Luciano
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Luciano has served as Chairman, CEO, and President of ADM since January 2016, having joined the company in 2011 as EVP and COO. Previously, he was with The Dow Chemical Company, where he last served as executive vice president and president of the performance division.

directors.name: Francisco J. Sanchez
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Sanchez is a Partner at Holland & Knight LLP and Advisor to Pt. Capital since July 2020, and previously served as Under Secretary for International Trade at the U.S. Department of Commerce from 2010 to November 2013. He brings substantial experience in public policy, international trade, and international investment.

directors.name: Debra A. Sandler
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Sandler is President of LaGrenade Group, LLC, a marketing consultancy she founded in October 2015, and previously held senior roles at Mars, Inc. including Chief Health and Wellbeing Officer and President of Chocolate, North America. She also spent 10 years at Johnson & Johnson and held roles at PepsiCo.

directors.name: Kelvin R. Westbrook
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Westbrook is President and CEO of KRW Advisors, LLC since 2007 and is a former partner of a national law firm and co-founder of two large cable television and broadband companies. He brings legal, media, and marketing expertise to the Board.

directors.name: Lei Z. Schlitz
directors.bio_summary: Dr. Schlitz is Executive Vice President of the Automotive OEM segment at Illinois Tool Works Inc. since January 2020, having previously served as EVP of Food Equipment and in other leadership roles at Illinois Tool Works since 2008. She brings extensive leadership experience in strategy development, growth initiatives, and operational excellence.

extraction_notes: Theodore Colbert is listed as a new director nominee with no prior tenure on the ADM board. Donald Felsinger is identified as Lead Director in the proxy text. Juan R. Luciano serves as both Chairman and CEO. Tenure years are calculated based on 'Director since' year relative to 2021 annual meeting year. No executive officer section was included in the provided text excerpt, so executive_officers is empty. Pierre Dufour and Donald Felsinger's listed public board directorships (Air Liquide S.A., National Grid plc, Gannett Co.) are described as 'within the past five years' suggesting they may be past, not current; only Northrop Grumman is listed as current for Felsinger. Camden Property Trust for Westbrook is listed as 'Lead Independent Trust Manager' which is treated as a public company board role.
